content:
# Wire Log Analysis

**Summary**: Analysis of data from wireline logs to identify lithology and stratigraphic boundaries.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] used wireline logs to differentiate the three informal members of the Buwaib/Biyadh (undiff.) formation.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The lower and middle members appear to be equivalent of the Lekhwair Formation whereas the upper member appears to be equivalent to the Kharaib Formation. ([[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992, p. 117]])
